scripts.pretest:node: npm run build:pack --workspace codepatchbay-web && npm run build:node && npm run build:tests
scripts.test: npm run test:node && npm run test:shell
scripts.build:node: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && find cli core server runtime bridges shared scripts \( -path '*/.*' -o -path '*/node_modules/*' \) -prune -o -type f \( -name '*.json' -o -name '*.sh' -o -name '*.md' -o -name '*.txt' -o -name '*.html' \) -exec sh -c 'for f do mkdir -p "dist/$(dirname "$f")"; cp "$f" "dist/$f"; done' sh {} + && for d in profiles skills templates; do if [ -d "$d" ]; then cp -R "$d" "dist/$d"; fi; done && if [ -f wiki/schema.md ]; then mkdir -p dist/wiki && cp wiki/schema.md dist/wiki/schema.md; fi && if [ -d wiki/projects/_template ]; then mkdir -p dist/wiki/projects && cp -R wiki/projects/_template dist/wiki/projects/_template; fi && if [ -d web/dist ]; then mkdir -p dist/web && cp -R web/dist dist/web/dist; fi && node dist/scripts/write-dist-metadata.js
scripts.build:tests: rm -rf dist-tests && tsc -p tsconfig.tests.json && find tests -type f \( -name '*.json' -o -name '*.sh' -o -name '*.md' -o -name '*.txt' \) -exec sh -c 'for f do mkdir -p "dist-tests/$(dirname "$f")"; cp "$f" "dist-tests/$f"; done' sh {} + && rm -rf dist/tests && cp -R dist-tests/tests dist/tests
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:node
scripts.verify:p0p1: npm run build && npm run build:tests && node dist/scripts/verify-p0-p1.js
